stations.name: Closest stations are Cannon Hill and Manly West
stations.walk_minutes_note: No station within Carindale. Buses are the practical public transport.

buses.note: Major bus interchange at Westfield Carindale connects to the CBD and other suburbs.

driving.motorway_access: Gateway Motorway access via Carindale and Tilley Roads. M3 corridor for southern travel.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 16 to 20 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Westfield Carindale is one of the largest shopping centres in Brisbane with full-line retail, supermarkets, dining, and cinema.

pockets.name: Family streets near Carindale State School
pockets.character: Established family-home streets with the catchment as the central buyer driver.

pockets.name: Premium streets near Minnippi Parklands
pockets.character: Streets bordering the parkland. Privacy and green-space access.

pockets.name: Carindale shopping centre area
pockets.character: Mix of residential and apartment stock close to the centre.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers wanting larger blocks, family-suburb feel, and the catchment access.
Buyers prioritising amenity, parking, and shopping convenience over inner-CBD walkability.
